languages.text: "Эттфатер, я знаю подобных тварей. Бесчестно прячущихся, пока силой и кровью ты не выманишь ее из логова. Я и не таких чудовищ повергал, но посмотрим — может, и эта Погонщица окажется достойна висы!"

"Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"
languages.original_text: "Эттфатер, я знаю подобных тварей. Бесчестно прячущихся, пока силой и кровью ты не выманишь ее из логова. Я и не таких чудовищ повергал, но посмотрим — может, и эта Погонщица окажется достойна висы!"

traits.locale_text: "Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

"Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

"Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

languages.text: 「エーテ・ヴァター、そのような生き物を知ってる。血と力でその巣から引きずり出すまで、恥辱を隠す生き物だ。私はこのモンスターを倒したことがないが、このドルーバーが詩に値するかどうかは、これからだろう！」
languages.original_text: "Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

traits.locale_text: 「エーテ・ヴァター、そのような生き物を知っています。血と力でその巣から引きずり出すまで、恥辱を隠す生き物です。私はこのモンスターを倒したことがありませんが、このドルーバーが詩に値するかどうかは、これからでしょう！」

languages.text: "Aett-Vater, böyle yaratıkları bilirim. Kan ve güç zoruyla ininden çıkarılana dek onursuzca saklanırlar. Bu canavarları daha önce hiç alt etmedim ama göreceğiz... Belki de bu Çoban, bir dizeye layık olduğunu kanıtlar!"
languages.original_text: "Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

traits.locale_text: "Aett-Vater, böyle yaratıkları bilirim. Kan ve güç zoruyla ininden çıkarılana dek onursuzca saklanırlar. Bu canavarları daha önce hiç alt etmedim ama göreceğiz... Belki de bu Çoban, bir dizeye layık olduğunu kanıtlar!"

languages.text: «Aett-Vater, he oído hablar de esas criaturas. Se ocultan sin ningún honor hasta que se les obliga a abandonar sus cubiles a sangre y fuego. Nunca antes he vencido a estos monstruos, pero ya se verá lo que nos depara el destino: ¡quizá este Pastor acabe siendo merecedor de unos versos!».
languages.original_text: "Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

traits.locale_text: «Aett-Vater, he oído hablar de esas criaturas. Se ocultan sin ningún honor hasta que se les obliga a abandonar sus cubiles a sangre y fuego. Nunca antes he vencido a estos monstruos, pero ya se verá lo que nos depara el destino: ¡quizá este Pastor acabe siendo merecedor de unos versos!».

languages.text: “狼领，我听说过这种生物。它们会卑劣地躲藏，直到你用鲜血或蛮力将其从巢穴中引出。我以前从未处理过这种怪物，但且看吧——或许这只拒生花能配得上一首赞歌！”
languages.original_text: "Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

traits.locale_text: “狼领，我听说过这种生物。它们会卑劣地躲藏，直到你用鲜血或蛮力将其从巢穴中引出。我以前从未处理过这种怪物，但且看吧——或许这只拒生花能配得上一首赞歌！”

languages.text: « Ces créatures ne me sont pas inconnues, aett-vater. Elles se cachent lâchement jusqu'à ce qu'on les pousse par la force et le sang à sortir de leur trou. Je n'ai encore jamais vaincu pareil monstre, mais nous verrons bien... Ce Chasseur se montrera peut-être digne d'une chanson ! »
languages.original_text: "Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

traits.locale_text: « Ces créatures ne me sont pas inconnues, aett-vater. Elles se cachent lâchement jusqu'à ce qu'on les pousse par la force et le sang à sortir de leur trou. Je n'ai encore jamais vaincu pareil monstre, mais nous verrons bien... Ce Chasseur se montrera peut-être digne d'une chanson ! »

languages.text: "Aett-Vater, ich kenne solche Kreaturen. Sie verstecken sich unehrenhaft, bis man sie mit Blut und Gewalt aus ihrem Bau lockt. Ich habe diese Monster noch nie bekämpft, aber wir werden sehen ... vielleicht ist dieser Treiber eines Verses würdig!"
languages.original_text: "Aett-Vater, I know of such creatures. Hiding dishonourably until you lure it from its lair by blood and by force. I have not vanquished these monsters before, but we shall see — perhaps this Drover will prove worthy of a verse!"

traits.locale_text: "Aett-Vater, ich kenne solche Kreaturen. Sie verstecken sich unehrenhaft, bis man sie mit Blut und Gewalt aus ihrem Bau lockt. Ich habe diese Monster noch nie bekämpft, aber wir werden sehen ... vielleicht ist dieser Treiber eines Verses würdig!"
